title: Report on the proposed Affordable Housing Delivery Scheme by the Welsh Government
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to the Welsh Government concerning the proposed Affordable Housing Delivery Scheme.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of the Welsh Government’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed Affordable Housing Delivery Scheme by the Welsh Government case page. "
